positive: A central, stylized celestial scene depicting a vibrant nebula and wandering constellation map set against a deep cosmic void. The style should be high-contrast geometric linework combined with ethereal watercolor washes, emphasizing glowing light trails and clean, distinct silhouettes of astronomical elements. Use a palette of deep indigo, brilliant sapphire blue, neon teal, and touches of gold leaf effect. The composition must be centered and highly graphic, suitable for printing on apparel, with a clear focal point of a stylized crescent moon and flowing galactic ribbons. Minimalist, elegant, vector art style, golden ratio composition, studio quality print.
